equipment_screen.replace_item: Do you want to replace this item?
equipment_screen.equip_item: Do you want to equip this item?
equipment_screen.sell_item: Do you want to sell this item?
equipment_screen.unequip_item: Do you want to unequip this item?
equipment_screen.max_level: The item has reached its maximum upgrade level.
equipment_screen.inventory_full: Your inventory is full! You need to make space in your inventory to receive the dropped item. Remember that you can sell items you already have.

action_buttons.attack_description: Deals damage equal to your stats and regenerates 1 mana point.
action_buttons.super_attack_description: Deals twice as much damage as a normal attack.
action_buttons.weakness_description: Reduces the enemy's attack by 30 percent.
action_buttons.clearance_description: Removes all negative effects from the character.

exit_dialog.exit_to_menu_confirmation: Do you want to exit to the menu? The game will not be saved.

appbar.eq_description: Here you can manage your inventory.
appbar.merge_description: Here you can merge items to create new ones.
appbar.save_progress: Here you can save your game progress.

game_over_dialog.game_over_description: Congratulations, you finished the game. You managed to collect the 4 required items.
